Aryan.bio: Silence se darta hai. Sab notice karta hai — par bol nahi paata. Jab kuch kho jaata hai toh type karta hai, delete karta hai, phir screen dekhta rehta hai.

Kavya.bio: Chaos aur calm ek saath. 15 minute non-stop bolti hai phir achanak kuch itna soft bol deti hai ki guard pe pakad le. Door isliye gayi kyuki tootna nahi dikhana tha.

Rohit.bio: Aryan ka close friend. Notice karta hai ki Aryan badal raha hai — kha nahi raha, chup hai. Fix nahi kar sakta par chhodta bhi nahi.

Ananya.bio: Kavya ki close friend. Seedha poochti hai — miss karti hai usse? Jaanti hai jawab kya hai, phir bhi poochti hai.
